title: ixeridium dentatum f. stoloniferum
intro: Ixeridium dentatum f. stoloniferum, also known as creeping saxifrage, is a type of flowering plant in the saxifrage family. This perennial plant is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of creeping saxifrage include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Creeping saxifrage is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its benefits and potential side effects.
